summary: Tested SSE bulk metadata fetch and scan progress features. Backend APIs working correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend ScanProgressModal has a UI state update bug - scan completes successfully but modal doesn't update from idle state.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal UI does not update from 'idle' to 'scanning'/'complete' state after clicking Start Scan button. API calls succeed (200 status) but React state doesn't update.

integration_issues.issue: Button click triggers API call successfully but setStatus('scanning') doesn't update the UI. Possible React state update issue or event handler not properly bound.

passed_tests: GET /api/movies/fetch-all-metadata/stream returns SSE format with 'data:' prefix
SSE stream starts with 'start' type event containing total and message fields
SSE stream ends with 'complete' type event containing updated, total, message fields
GET /api/scan/progress/{scan_id} returns progress data with all required fields
Scan progress response contains directories_total, directories_scanned, files_found, movies_added, skipped_due_to_limit
action_items: FIX: ScanProgressModal.jsx - Button click triggers API but React state doesn't update. Check if startScan function is properly bound to onClick handler.
INVESTIGATE: Possible race condition in ScanProgressModal where setStatus('scanning') is called but UI doesn't re-render
critical_code_review_comments: ScanProgressModal.jsx line 48: setStatus('scanning') is called but UI remains in 'idle' state - React state update issue
The scan API works correctly (verified via network logs showing 200 responses), but the frontend state management has a bug

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Scan button visible and clickable, but modal state doesn't update after clicking Start Scan

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend SSE and scan progress APIs fully tested and working. Frontend ScanProgressModal has a state update bug - the startScan function is called (API requests succeed) but setStatus('scanning') doesn't update the UI. The modal stays in 'idle' state showing 'Ready to scan' even after scan completes. BulkMetadataFetch component was not tested as there are no movies without metadata (all 6 movies have metadata).

rca_of_issue.issue: ScanProgressModal UI doesn't update after clicking Start Scan
rca_of_issue.root_cause: React state update (setStatus) is called but component doesn't re-render. Possible causes: 1) Event handler not properly bound, 2) State update batching issue, 3) Component unmounting/remounting
reproduction_steps: 3. Modal opens showing 'Ready to scan all directories'
5. API calls succeed (verified in network tab)
6. Modal UI stays in 'idle' state instead of showing progress/completion
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Check ScanProgressModal component for proper state management. Verify onClick handler is correctly bound to startScan function.
